answers: Start learning guitar with basic open chords — G, C, D, Em, Am. Practice chord transitions daily, learn simple songs, and build finger strength. Consistency matters more than long practice sessions.
Guitar shikhte hole age basic chords shikho — G, C, D, Em, Am. Protidin 15-30 min practice koro. YouTube e Justin Guitar ar Marty Music onek valo free tutorial ache.
For beginners, acoustic guitar is usually recommended as it builds finger strength. A decent beginner acoustic costs 3,000-8,000 BDT. Electric guitar needs an amp but is easier on fingers.

Key beginner tips: keep your fingernails short, press strings close to the fret (not on it), practice chord changes slowly then speed up, and learn songs you love to stay motivated. Your fingers will hurt at first — that's normal!
